basic_details.job_title: RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher Exam Date 2026 (Out)- Check Schedule & Admit Card
basic_details.short_information: RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher Exam Date 2026: The Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) has officially released the exam date for the 2nd Grade Teacher recruitment. Candidates who have applied for the 2nd Grade Teacher posts can check the complete exam schedule below. The examination is scheduled to be held from 12 – 18 July 2026. All eligible candidates are advised to download their admit cards and prepare accordingly.

content_sections.heading: RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher Exam Date 2026 Complete Details
content_sections.text: The Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) has published the official exam schedule for the 2nd Grade Teacher recruitment 2026. This notification is crucial for thousands of candidates who are preparing for these government positions. The examination will test candidates' knowledge in concerned subjects, and only shortlisted candidates will proceed to the next selection stage.

content_sections.heading: How to Download RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher Exam Date 2026 Notification?
content_sections.text: Candidates can follow these simple steps to check and download the RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher exam date notification from the official website: Step 1: Visit the official website of RPSC at rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in Step 2: On the homepage, look for the "What's New" or "Notifications" section Step 3: Find and click on the link titled "RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher Exam Date 2026" Step 4: The notification PDF will open in a new window Step 5: Read all details carefully including exam date, timing, and reporting time Step 6: Download and save the PDF for future reference Step 7: Take a printout of the notification for your records Direct Link: Click here to download RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher Exam Date Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Important Links for RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher Exam 2026
RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher Exam Pattern 2026
content_sections.text: Understanding the exam pattern is crucial for effective preparation. Here's what candidates need to know about the RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher examination: Exam Mode: Offline OMR Based Written Exam Total Marks: As per subject-wise pattern Number of Questions: Varies by paper Duration: As per official schedule Negative Marking: Yes (Details in notification) Subjects/Sections: General Knowledge, Concerned Subject (Hindi, English, Mathematics, Science, Social Science etc.)

content_sections.heading: Preparation Tips for RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher Exam
content_sections.text: With the exam date announced, candidates should focus on smart preparation strategies: 1. Create a Study Schedule: Divide your time wisely among all subjects based on your strengths and weaknesses. 2. Focus on Previous Year Papers: Solve at least 5-10 previous year question papers to understand the pattern and difficulty level. 3. Take Mock Tests: Regular mock tests will help you manage time and identify areas needing improvement. 4. Revise Regularly: Make short notes and revise them daily, especially for GK and current affairs. 5. Stay Updated: Keep yourself updated with current affairs, especially related to Rajasthan and education sector.

content_sections.heading: RPSC Admit Card 2026 - When to Download?
content_sections.text: The RPSC will release the admit card for 2nd Grade Teacher examination approximately 7-10 days before the exam date. Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official website using their registration number and date of birth. Documents Required on Exam Day: Printed copy of Admit Card Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhar Card/PAN Card/Driving License/Voter ID) Recent passport-size photographs Required stationery items (as per instructions)

content_sections.heading: What After the RPSC Exam?
content_sections.text: After successfully appearing in the RPSC 2nd Grade Teacher examination, candidates should: 1. Result Declaration: The result is typically declared within 30-45 days after the examination. Results will be available on the official website. 2. Answer Key: Preliminary answer keys may be released within 2-3 days after the exam. Candidates can raise objections if any discrepancy is found. 3. Next Stage: Qualified candidates will be called for Document Verification as per the selection process. Disclaimer: The information provided above is based on the official notification released by Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC). Candidates are advised to visit the official website rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in for the most accurate and updated information.

faq.answer: The examination is scheduled to be held from 12 – 18 July 2026. Candidates can check the official notification for complete details.
